candidate_llm_application: LLM sampling-temperature spectra: each temperature level emits characteristic distribution shape; design compositions that produce target spectral mixture for downstream tasks.

results.title: Temperature Sampling Diversity: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on temperature sampling diversity, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Partial overlap: same artefact but mechanism diverges; result is tangential to candidate's claim.
